negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing specialized subpool visibility in size reporting, metrics, invariant accounting, and scheduled removal metrics.
related_but_insufficient_code: No scheduled subpool exists; pool accounting and metrics cannot report dedicated scheduled or awaiting-execution subpool sizes as required.

rationale: Separate candidates add scheduled removal/accounting, scheduled removal metrics, and later awaiting-execution pool accounting. These are observability and invariant-accounting requirements rather than direct execution policy.
statement: Scheduled, async, and awaiting-execution subpools must participate in pool size reporting, metrics, and invariant accounting, and scheduled-pool removals should emit removal metrics for successfully removed transactions.
suggested_falsification_tests: Insert and remove scheduled transactions, then assert scheduled pool length, PoolSize scheduled fields, and scheduled metrics reflect the updates.
Remove scheduled transactions by id and by hash in separate fixtures and assert the txpool removal metric is emitted with reason manual only when a matching transaction is removed.
Insert or mock awaiting-execution transactions and assert TxPool::size, metrics, and assert_invariants include awaiting_execution in the total.
summary: Specialized subpool accounting visibility is absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Insert scheduled and awaiting-execution transactions and assert PoolSize/metrics include them; current port lacks scheduled subpool accounting.
title: Specialized subpools remain visible in pool accounting
